descriptionHtml:
Beneteau Oceanis 40 for sale 2010 | 2 Cabins Version | Tax Paid

Very-well maintained | with only 650 engines hours

Beneteau Oceanis 40 for sale 2010 — a practical and well-presented sailing yacht, offered with Spanish registration and tax paid. She is in good condition, newly painted and has been maintained for comfortable coastal cruising or longer passages.

Specifications:

  • Model: Beneteau Oceanis 40 for sale 2010
  • Length overall: 11.82 m
  • Beam: 3.91 m
  • Flag of registry: Spain
  • Tax: Paid
  • Cruising speed: 8 mph

Accommodation:

  • Cabins: 2
  • Toilets: 1

Engine:

  • Motor: Yanmar 40 hp
  • Year: 2010
  • Fuel: Diesel
  • Hours: 650
  • Propeller: 3 blades

Sails:

  • Fully battened mainsail: 2 Mainsails - one never used
  • Furling genoa: Yes

Electronics:

  • Autopilot
  • GPS
  • Plotter
  • Radar
  • Radar detector
  • Compass
  • Depthsounder
  • Log-Speedometer
  • Wind speed and direction
  • Radio
  • CD Player
  • DVD Player
  • TV Set
  • VCR
  • Cockpit speakers

Inside equipment:

  • Battery charger
  • Inverter
  • Shore power
  • Bow thruster
  • Deep freezer
  • Electric bilge pump
  • Manual bilge pump
  • Electric head
  • Microwave oven
  • Oven
  • Refrigerator
  • Sea water pump

Outside equipment:

  • Cockpit cushions
  • Cockpit shower
  • Cockpit table
  • Electric winch
  • Gangway
  • Outboard engine brackets
  • Radar reflector
  • Swimming ladder
  • Teak cockpit
  • Teak sidedecks

Covers:

  • Bimini top
  • Cockpit cover
  • Lazy bag

If you are looking for a mid-sized cruiser that is ready to use with taxes cleared and Spanish flag of registry, this vessel represents a straightforward option. She is in good condition and available for inspection. Contact us now!!
